positive: A majestic and stylized geometric owl perched on a crescent moon, rendered in a neo-art deco stained glass mosaic style. The owl has large, expressive eyes and sharp, angular features. The background features swirling nebula patterns and simplified celestial bodies (planets, comets). Composition should be highly symmetrical, with the owl centered and filling the upper two-thirds of the frame. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, gold leaf accents, and creamy white. High contrast, clean black outlines emphasizing the mosaic facets. Vector graphic quality, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Minimalist yet ornate. Intricate detail, sharp lines, flat graphic design, central symmetry.
